name: Deep Winter
description: Rich, deep, and cool. Think jewel tones — deep burgundy, emerald, navy. Skin has a blue or pink undertone with high contrast between hair, skin, and eyes.

name: True Winter
description: The coolest and most contrasted season. Icy brights and true primary colors — royal blue, true red, hot pink. Clear and vivid tones with no warmth.

name: Bright Winter
description: High contrast with a touch of warmth. Bright, clear, saturated colors — fuchsia, electric blue, bright coral. The brightest of the winter seasons.

name: Light Spring
description: Warm, light, and fresh. Soft warm pastels — peach, light coral, warm ivory. Delicate coloring with low contrast and golden undertones.

name: True Spring
description: Warm, clear, and medium contrast. Fresh warm brights — coral, turquoise, warm green. Think of spring flowers in full bloom.

name: Bright Spring
description: The clearest and most vivid spring. High contrast with warm undertones — bright coral, electric green, vivid aqua. Bold and eye-catching.

name: Light Summer
description: Cool, light, and muted. Soft dusty pastels — lavender, powder blue, dusty rose. Low contrast with a gentle, muted quality.

name: True Summer
description: The most muted and cool season. Soft, dusty, and grayed colors — mauve, slate blue, sage. Everything has a blue-gray undertone.

name: Soft Summer
description: Cool and muted with a touch of warmth. Dusty and softened colors — dusty teal, muted berry, soft olive. The most neutral of the summers.

name: Soft Autumn
description: Warm and muted with a touch of coolness. Softened earth tones — dusty peach, muted olive, warm taupe. The gentlest autumn.

name: True Autumn
description: The warmest and most golden season. Rich earth tones — burnt orange, olive, warm brown. Think of autumn leaves at their peak.

name: Deep Autumn
description: Deep, warm, and rich. Dark warm tones — chocolate brown, olive green, burnt sienna. High contrast with warm undertones throughout.
